summary:
The tack being placed below and lateral to the ilio-pubic tract lies within the distribution of the genital branch of the genitofemoral nerve, which provides somatic sensation to the upper lateral thigh. Therefore, postoperative pain in the thigh results from injury to this specific nerve.

Based solely on Agent2's reasoning as presented, provide your final summary output adhering strictly to requirements.
